task_description: Add DynamoDB table for storing audio pipeline metadata and extend Step Functions state machine with basic input/output handling (PutItem on trigger, UpdateItem on completion/failure). Follow strict TDD. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 23 tests pass (15 existing + 8 new DynamoDB/state machine tests). Build completes with 0 errors/warnings. CDK synth produces valid CloudFormation. Tests exercise real DynamoDB table properties (key schema, billing, encryption, PITR) and verify state machine definition contains DynamoDB integrations and IAM permissions.
